title: Fermented Crumbly German Peppers Crumble
description: A comforting, plant-based dish perfect for sick days featuring mixed peppers that are roasted and fermented to create a crumbly texture.
instructions: Slice bell peppers into thin strips, removing any seeds or cores.
Mix sliced zucchini with minced garlic, tomato paste, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine bell pepper strips and zucchini mixture until evenly coated. Spread out on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until edges are slightly crispy.
After roasting, allow to cool slightly before refrigerating overnight or storing in an airtight container. Refrigeration will help ferment and create a crumbly texture.
Refrigerated crumble can be enjoyed as a snack throughout the day.
